## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Do you want to drive a lot of website traffic and grow
subscribers and revenue?

Then, the first thing you’ll need to do is to invest in the right
growth tools.

A lot of WordPress growth tool brands are now offering crazy
limited-time deals.

Take a look at some of the best Small Business Weekend offers 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..livH-B7d2ZLBHu08SRcgJEOL1fD4TYSPutcX6p1yIXs ) on business
growth tools:

My Favorite Five for 2024

1. All in One SEO for WordPress ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..C1_84r18UI6E735w2ewDr7OBVNv_EBL4ySve8M2NvL0 ) (70% off)
If you're looking for the most effective WordPress SEO plugin,
then AIOSEO is your best bet. I use it on WPBeginner and it's
trusted by over 3 million websites. As we approach 2025,
businesses aiming to stay ahead in search engine results should
consider AIOSEO as their SEO solution.

2. MonsterInsights ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..InpUsfVPiQiuCn7L0C70pH2jWcuJi1KuyLX_y-lQNLA ) (70% off) – I
use MonsterInsights on WPBeginner and almost every other website
I manage. It makes setting up with Google Analytics easy. Plus,
it gives you stats that matter right within WordPress. You can
also integrate it with popular plugins such as WooCommerce,
WPForms, and more.

3. Get $150 off WPCode ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..KBWXHsFHo3lOWNM6Zpz-7JveSLCf-jpRLhclKhACr5o ) - The best code
snippets plugin for WordPress that lets you easily add ad
tracking pixels and also helps you reduce the # of plugins you're
running on your site.

It's basically a Google Tag manager for WordPress except a lot
easier.

4. Nextiva ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.hllYyorE9MenYqgL9QaBRZI3w--r8KFQSyZcecpjvwE ) (Save BIG) -
This is the virtual business telephone system that we use in our
business. You can get a virtual business phone number, set up
voice greetings, and business call hours. The best part is that
you can receive calls on your computer, mobile phone, etc., from
anywhere in the world without ever giving your personal mobile
phone number to clients.

5. FunnelKit ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HKPgBzP_00P5yiBhUTJ4g9Kfw5-zpKsbYiAWzifGJxk ) (55% off)
